description_long: This is a dark, metallic helmet reminiscent of late medieval or Renaissance-era armor, featuring a rounded dome with a pronounced central ridge running from front to back. The helmet is adorned with subtle engraved floral or vine motifs along the upper dome, adding a decorative touch to its otherwise utilitarian design. The faceplate is a full-face visor with a narrow horizontal slit for vision and a series of small, evenly spaced ventilation holes below the slit. The lower section of the helmet flares outward into a segmented, articulated neck guard, providing protection while allowing some movement. Rivets and hinge mechanisms are visible at the sides, suggesting the visor can be lifted or removed. The surface is highly polished, giving it a glossy, reflective finish that highlights its detailed craftsmanship.
description: A glossy, dark metal helmet with engraved floral motifs, a full-face visor with a vision slit and ventilation holes, and a flared, segmented neck guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the engraved dome, full-face visor with ventilation holes, and articulated neck guard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the central ridge, narrow vision slit, and symmetrical arrangement of ventilation holes.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the hinge mechanism, engraved motifs, and the layered neck guard.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the flared, segmented neck guard and the central ridge running down the back.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Multiple small round holes arranged in two horizontal rows below the vision slit on the visor.
attribute_graphic_design: Subtle engraved floral or vine motifs on the upper dome.
